subcodes.first_line: O ye who have advanced and been accepted! A letter from Haifa to his honour Dervish Ghulam-Husayn, upon him be the Glory of God, the Most Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المقبلون المقبولون جناب درویش غلامحسین علیه بهاء الله الابهی از حیفا رقیمی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @universal peace; world unity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power of love, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
